title: How to Build a Capsule Wardrobe
author: Admin
excerpt: Simple rules to build a timeless wardrobe with fewer pieces.
content: Focus on quality basics, neutral colors, and versatile layers for every season.

title: Choosing the Right Running Shoes
author: Coach Lee
excerpt: A practical guide to selecting shoes based on gait and terrain.
content: Always test cushioning, heel support, and toe-box width before buying.
